---
name: Feature request (English)
about: Propose a new capability or workflow that does not currently exist
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
---

## :bulb: Feature summary

Clearly and concisely describe the capability you would like to add.

## :dart: Use case and problem

Explain who needs the feature, when they would use it, what difficulty they face today, and why the existing features do not solve it.

## :footprints: Expected workflow

Describe the expected entry point, interactions, result, and error cases in operational order. If it involves a single file, folder, or workspace, state the intended scope.

## :brain: Proposed solution

If you have an approach in mind, describe it with examples, expected behavior, and interactions with existing bookmark, AI, import, or export features.

## :left_right_arrow: Alternatives and compatibility

Describe any alternatives you considered and possible compatibility effects on existing settings, shortcuts, bookmark data, or workflows.

## :memo: Additional context

Add references, mockups, related issues, sample data, or anything else that may help evaluate the request.
